title: LEGO Star Wars C-3PO Figure - Collectible Display Model Kit for Adults - incl. a Stand, Information Plaque & a Minifigure - Gift Idea for Fans 75398
features: LEGO Star Wars C-3PO figure – Bring one the most delightful Star Wars characters into your home with this realistic C-3PO build-and-display model kit
Authentic details – Capture the look of C-3PO in LEGO style, then turn the head and move the arms of the Star Wars figure to create familiar poses
LEGO Star Wars minifigure – The main buildable model of C-3PO in this LEGO building set for adults is complemented by a C-3PO LEGO minifigure
25th anniversary – Includes a stand with an information plaque, space for the C-3PO LEGO minifigure, plus a LEGO Star Wars 25th anniversary brick
Collectible set – Reunite 2 friends by displaying C-3PO alongside LEGO R2-D2 (75379, sold separately) and adjusting C-3PO’s arm to pat R2-D2’s head
Star Wars gift idea for adults – This collectible, brick-built display model makes an out-of-this-world gift idea for men and women who are Star Wars fans or LEGO collectors
LEGO Star Wars sets for adults – From a galaxy far, far away to your home, LEGO Star Wars building sets for adults are designed for people like you who enjoy immersive, hands-on creative projects
description: From the manufacturer Nostalgic gift idea Buildable C-3PO LEGO figure for play and display Construct an intricately detailed brick-built model of C-3PO, one the most beloved Star Wars characters in the galaxy, and display your creation as fun room decor in your home. Collectible set Characteristic C-3PO poses Turn C-3PO’s head and move his arms to create familiar poses and inspire memories of classic Star Wars saga scenes featuring the human-cyborg relations specialist. Fantastic room decor 25th anniversary centrepiece A stand with a C-3PO information plaque and space for the included C-3PO LEGO minifigure, plus a LEGO Star Wars 25th anniversary brick complete an eye-catching display. Creative fun Experience the joy of building Find easy-to-follow instructions in the box and on the LEGO Builder app to help you build your C-3PO LEGO figure, so you can relax and enjoy every step of this immersive and rewarding creative challenge. Iconic duo Friends reunited Bring together 2 old friends by displaying C-3PO alongside the R2-D2 brick-built LEGO droid figure (set 75379, sold separately) and reconfiguring one of C-3PO’s arms to pat R2-D2’s head.
